---
title: "Revealing the Mechanism of Sodium Diffusion in NaxFePO4 Using an Improved Force Field"
author: ["Mauricio R. Bonilla", "Ariel Lozano", "Bruno Escribano", "Javier Carrasco", "Elena Akhmatskaya"]
date: 2018-04-02
publication: "The Journal of Physical Chemistry C, **122**, 8065–8075 (2018)."
categories: ["Li-ion"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jpcc.8b00230
url_preprint:
journ: "The Journal of Physical Chemistry C"
issue: 122
page: 8065–8075
year: 2018
image: featured.png
pub_number: 1

---
